title: acmispon micranthus
intro: Acmispon micranthus, also known as the white broom or white lotus bush, is a flowering legume native to the southwestern United States. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Acmispon micranthus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and is also used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves to promote overall well-being.
